stemHtml: Per SERA, VFR flights shall not take off or enter a CTR without ATC clearance when the ceiling is below...

options.a: 1000 ft or ground visibility less than 5 km.
options.b: 2000 ft or ground visibility less than 5 km.
options.c: 1000 ft or ground visibility less than 8 km.
options.d: 1500 ft or ground visibility less than 5 km.
